news.headline: Celularity's net product sales increased over sevenfold through Q3 2024 compared to Q3 2023, with total net revenues of $36.1 million for the nine months ending September 30, 2024, an increase of 238.6% YoY.
news.summary: Celularity Inc. has filed its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the period ending September 30, 2024, making the company current with its quarterly report filings. For the nine months ending September 30, 2024, Celularity reported total net revenues of $36.1 million, showing an increase of $25.4 million (238.6%) compared to the same period in 2023 ($10.7 million). For the three months ending September 30, 2024, total net revenues were $9.3 million, an increase of $5.5 million (145.5%) compared to the same period in 2023 ($3.8 million). Product sales, net, experienced significant growth, with $26.2 million in the nine months ending September 30, 2024, compared to $3.6 million for the same period in 2023, marking a 621.1% increase. Celularity's Founder, Chairman, and CEO, Robert J. Hariri expressed confidence in the reported revenue, highlighting the company's growth in revenue and disciplined expense management. The company continues to evaluate opportunities for realignment and growth.

news.headline: Nissan employees in Quebec City test new 2025 Kicks in extreme cold without winter gear at 5:30 a.m. - BusinessWire.
news.summary: In Quebec City, at approximately 5:30 a.m. on a Sunday morning in February, four Nissan employees were gathered in an empty parking lot next to the new 2025 Nissan Kicks. It was a chilly morning with snow around them, and despite not wearing winter gear like hats or gloves, they were there for work. The team, including members from quality and development departments, hadn't even had their morning coffee or shower yet, with sunrise still two hours away. This scene exemplifies their dedication to their roles, even in uncomfortable conditions.

news.headline: BRP renews normal course issuer bid to purchase 3,331,852 shares for cancellation, approved by TSX.
news.summary: VALCOURT, Quebec - December 6, 2024 - BRP Inc. (TSX: DOO) (NASDAQ: DOOO) disclosed that the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) has given the green light for the renewal of its normal course issuer bid (NCIB). This allows the company to buy back and cancel a maximum of 3,331,852 subordinate voting shares.

news.headline: NYC Apparel Manufacturing launches TikTok Store Program to empower brand owners in digital space. Dec 6, 2024 PRNewswire.
news.summary: In New York City on December 6, 2024, Apparel Manufacturing announced a new program aimed at supporting brand owners in the digital market. This innovative initiative seeks to empower brand owners amidst the evolving digital landscape. The program comes as a response to the increasing popularity of digitization and online retail. The initiative is set to offer comprehensive apparel solutions to brand owners with a focus on enhancing their presence in the digital marketplace. This program is poised to revolutionize the way brand owners navigate and succeed in the digital realm.

news.headline: Hyperlink InfoSystem emerges as top app developers in USA by 2025, capitalizing on booming mobile app market.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, in cities like New York and Los Angeles, the popular notion that "there's probably an app for it" holds especially true for the United States, the world's top consumer of mobile applications. With a thriving mobile app market, the USA stands out as a leading hub for app consumption.

news.headline: Global wearable technology market set to reach USD 152.82 billion by 2029, with 16.8% CAGR. Top companies include Apple, Samsung, Sony, and Huawei. Rising demand for healthcare wearables. Challenges include security issues and regulatory concerns.
news.summary: The global wearable technology market is projected to increase from USD 70.30 billion in 2024 to USD 152.82 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 16.8% during this period. The growth is driven by the rising adoption of next-gen displays in wearables, consumer preference for sleek devices in fitness and healthcare, and the popularity of IoT and connected devices. Augmented reality integration enhances user experiences, while hands-free banking adds convenience and security. Key companies in this market include Apple Inc., Garmin Ltd., Samsung, Sony Group Corporation, Huawei Technologies Co., Ltd., LG Electronics, Alphabet Inc., and Microsoft. Drivers for the market include the rise of IoT devices, with challenges including security issues and data protection concerns. Opportunities lie in the increasing demand for healthcare wearables. Regulatory issues and healthcare data vulnerability present challenges. The growth is attributed to next-gen displays in wearables and an increase in AI-powered segments within the market.

news.headline: Insmed gives inducement grants under NASDAQ rule, aiming to transform patient lives; Dec 6, 2024. (Word count: 16)
news.summary: In Bridgewater, New Jersey, on December 6, 2024, Insmed Incorporated (Nasdaq: INSM), a leading global biopharmaceutical company focused on improving patient lives through innovative therapies for severe illnesses, revealed the approval of an inducement plan. This plan aims to attract top talent as the company continues to expand its operations.

news.headline: Preclinical data shows WaveBreak's WTX-245 can potentially treat ALS, FTD by inhibiting TDP-43 pathology sources.
news.summary: In Boston, a new drug called WTX-245 is designed to address the underlying causes of TDP-43 protein aggregation. This drug aims to promote normal gene transcription for several important messenger RNAs crucial for the proper functioning and survival of motor neurons. WaveBreak has developed a unique neuronal cell model that accurately reproduces the pathology of TDP-43 aggregation and the biology of associated diseases. These advancements offer promising prospects for treating conditions related to motor neuron dysfunction.

news.headline: Canada's aggressive immigration policy aims to reduce over 900,000 non-permanent residents within 2 years, which could significantly slow economic growth according to research from The Conference Board of Canada.
news.summary: In Ottawa, Ontario, as of December 6, 2024, research from The Conference Board of Canada suggests that the federal government's revised immigration policy, which aims to decrease the number of non-permanent residents in Canada, could have a notable impact on economic growth. Chief Economist Pedro Antunes highlighted that the abrupt plan to reduce over 900,000 non-permanent residents within two years is a drastic measure considering the country's delicate recovery stage. The surge in the non-permanent resident population in 2023 and 2024 strained housing and infrastructure, prompting this policy shift. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Global feed intermediate chemicals market valued at $14.0 billion in 2023, projected to reach $20.7 billion by 2034, driven by rising food security concerns and demand for sustainable animal products. Technological advancements and innovations also fueling market growth.
news.summary: The global feed intermediate chemicals market was valued at $14.0 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 3.7% to reach $20.7 billion by 2034, driven by the need for robust feed solutions to enhance livestock productivity and ensure food security. Feed intermediate chemicals such as amino acids, vitamins, and enzymes play a vital role in animal nutrition, supporting livestock health and meeting consumer demand for sustainable animal products. Key drivers include the rising global population and food demand, preference for natural feed additives, and technological advancements. Leading companies are investing in advanced technologies like enzyme-based solutions and probiotics to improve livestock digestion and productivity.

news.headline: Egan-Jones backs all NexPoint nominees for UDF IV annual meeting due to board issues. Valuable contribution cited.
news.summary: The UDF IV board and management are criticized for entrenchment, lack of transparency, erosion of shareholder value, and breaching shareholder trust, as cited by NexPoint. The importance of NexPoint's expertise in enhancing shareholder value is emphasized. This information was revealed in a press release on December 6, 2024, in Dallas.

news.headline: Moffitt Cancer Center partners with Gold Kidney Health Plan in Florida for Medicare Advantage plans.
news.summary: Gold Kidney Health Plan, a prominent Medicare Advantage provider focusing on chronic special needs plans, has disclosed the enlargement of its provider network to incorporate Moffitt Cancer Center in Florida. This partnership aims to extend Gold Kidney Health Plan's reach and enhance its services for individuals with special health needs. The expansion of the provider network is a significant milestone for Gold Kidney Health Plan, signaling the inclusion of a renowned medical institution within its network. This move is anticipated to benefit a large number of individuals in need of specialized healthcare services, underlining Gold Kidney Health Plan's commitment to offering high-quality care to its members.

news.headline: HNO International's CEO to discuss plans for hydrogen economy at NASDAQ on Dec. 13, 2024. #HNOI #HydrogenEconomy
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, Donald Owens, the Chairman and CEO of HNO International (OTC: HNOI), a prominent player in green hydrogen technology, is scheduled to speak at the NASDAQ floor on December 13, 2024. Owens will discuss HNO International's ambitious initiatives to transform the energy industry.

news.headline: Plaza Tire opens its 77th location in Evansville, Indiana, marking brand's steady growth.
news.summary: Sun Auto Tire & Service has expanded its presence with the opening of a 2nd location in Indiana, marking its 77th nationwide. The new Plaza Tire Service outlet is now operational at 2801 North Green River Road in Evansville, Indiana. This growth signifies the company's commitment to furthering its reach within the automotive service industry.

news.headline: Qatar Construction Equipment Market set to reach 6,063 units by 2029, growing at 5% CAGR, driven by LNG project investments.
news.summary: A recent report has been added to a leading market research provider's offerings, focusing on the Qatar Construction Equipment Market. In 2023, the market size was 4,525 units, and it is projected to grow to 6,063 units by 2029, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5%. Qatar's construction sector is seeing increased investment, particularly in public infrastructure projects, such as the Doha Metro project. This strategic assessment highlights the significant developments and forecasted growth in the construction equipment market in Qatar over the coming years.

news.headline: IDrive Backup adds Dropbox and Box Backup features, meeting industry standards for data security and compliance.LOS ANGELES, Dec. 6, 2024.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, in Los Angeles, IDrive Backup, a renowned provider of cloud backup services, introduced their latest Dropbox Backup and Box Backup solutions. These new offerings have been designed to meet rigorous industry regulations, guaranteeing the security and protection of user data. With this development, IDrive Backup continues to prioritize ensuring data integrity, with the new solutions setting a high standard for compliance within the industry.

news.headline: Anchin adds new partner Robert Smith as leader of Emerging Companies Group, with over ten years of experience.
news.summary: In a press release dated December 6, 2024, Anchin, a prominent accounting and advisory firm headquartered in New York, disclosed that Robert Smith has rejoined the company as a Partner. He will also serve as the Leader of the firm's Emerging Companies Group. With more than a decade of experience in advising swiftly growing businesses, Robert's return is seen as a valuable asset by the company.

news.headline: Sunburn Cannabis opens 16th store in Florida at Indialantic, located at 1170 N Highway A1A.
news.summary: Sunburn Cannabis, a cannabis operator based in Florida, recently opened its first dispensary in Indialantic, marking the Company's 16th store in the state. Situated at 1170 N Highway A1A, this new store expands the company's reach in the region. The opening signifies a significant milestone for Sunburn Cannabis, showcasing its growth and presence in the Florida market.

news.headline: Tampa General Hospital's ambulatory surgery centers rank in top 5 in Florida by Newsweek. TAMPA.
news.summary: Tampa General Hospital (TGH) proudly reveals that both the TGH Outpatient Center and TGH Surgery Center at Morsani have achieved a significant rank, placing them within the top five ambulatory surgery centers in Florida. This achievement was officially announced on December 6, 2024, in Tampa, Florida. These centers are part of the esteemed academic health system and have garnered noteworthy recognition within the state for their exceptional performance and quality of care.

news.headline: Avelo Airlines dominates as America's most reliable airline, achieving top spot in on-time performance and lowest flight cancellation rate of the year. A record 125,000 customers flew during Thanksgiving, with 250,000 expected in December.
news.summary: Avelo has secured the top spot for on-time performance and maintained the lowest flight cancellation rate in the aviation industry for the initial 11 months of 2024. During Thanksgiving, the airline proudly served a remarkable 125,000 customers, marking a historic milestone. Furthermore, Avelo is on track to reach another record by flying an estimated 250,000 customers in December. The airline is currently celebrating its leadership in reliability, highlighting its commitment to providing dependable services to its passengers.

news.headline: PepsiCo to release Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results on Feb 4, 2025. Closing date: Dec 28, 2024. $PEP
news.summary: PepsiCo, Inc. revealed today plans to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 (ending December 28). The company, trading on NASDAQ under PEP, is set to share this information on Tuesday, February 4, 2025. Interested individuals can access the details and accompanying links through a public posting.

news.headline: Chain Bridge Bancorp, Inc. marks IPO with NYSE bell ringing after becoming first bank in 2+ years to go public.
news.summary: A bank holding company led by its founder has successfully completed the first IPO of a banking institution in over two years. Chain Bridge Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: CBNA), serving as the registered bank holding company for Chain Bridge Bank, N.A., marked its listing on the New York Stock Exchange. This event signifies a significant milestone for the Company, highlighting its growth and market presence in the banking sector.

news.headline: Equinix's Arun Dev to speak at Barclays Global Technology Conference on Dec 6, 2024. Leader in digital interconnection services. NASDAQ: EQIX.
news.summary: Equinix, Inc., a global leader in digital infrastructure, has revealed that Arun Dev, the Global Leader for Digital Interconnection Services, will be speaking at the Barclays Global Technology Conference on December __, 2024. Equinix, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq as EQIX and is known as the world's premier digital infrastructure company®.

news.headline: Brooklyn Nets and Phoenix Suns to play two preseason games in Macao in October 2025 at The Venetian Arena. 65 characters.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, it was announced that the NBA and Sands China Ltd. will collaborate to bring NBA China Games to Macao. The first preseason games are scheduled on October 10 and 12, 2025 at The Venetian Arena. This partnership marks a significant multiyear agreement between the two entities, showcasing a commitment to showcasing top-tier NBA basketball in Macao. This initiative aims to promote the sport and engage fans in the region. Fans can anticipate high-level basketball action during the preseason games featuring the Nets and Suns.

news.headline: VSee Health partners with AbundaBox to launch AbundaLife™, transforming health record management; addresses fragmented medical records by consolidating personal health data. (with Nasdaq company VSee Health)
news.summary: In San Jose, California, VSee Health, Inc. (Nasdaq: VSEE) revealed a new collaboration with AbundaBox to introduce AbundaLife™, an advanced health record management platform. Recognized for its expandable technology and extensive clinical knowledge, VSee Health is a telehealth solutions leader. AbundaLife™ aims to tackle the issue of scattered medical records in healthcare by merging individual health data into a single secure profile. This strategic partnership marks a significant development in the industry, offering a solution to a critical problem.

news.headline: Predictions for 2025 by Marian Salzman: Emphasize 'burrowing in', reducing tech, seeking 'delight'. #trends #2025
news.summary: A pioneer in online focus groups since the 1990s, Marian Salzman has been making waves for 30 years with her trend predictions. These include ideas like sleep replacing sex, the concept of "brand me," and the emergence of singletons. Currently, working as the senior vice president for strategic projects at Philip Morris International U.S., Salzman recently published her 30th annual trends report. Get more insights at: https://mariansalzman.com/trends-report.

news.headline: Trump opted for conventional picks for his economic team amid controversy. Embraced bipartisanly.
news.summary: The President-elect, Donald Trump, has chosen experienced individuals for his economic team instead of unconventional selections, appointing Wall Street veterans and seasoned Republican figures for crucial positions in his upcoming administration.

news.headline: New update: $1.2 billion investment in tech sector to create 3,000 jobs.
Biomea Fusion will present Phase I clinical data of BMF-500, a covalent FLT3 Inhibitor for acute leukemia on Dec. 9 at 4:30 pm.
news.summary: Biomea Fusion, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company traded on Nasdaq as BMEA, is set to hold a conference call and webcast on December 9, 2024, at 4:30 pm EST. The focus of the meeting will be to share findings from COVALENT-103, their Phase I trial of BMF-500. This investigational covalent FLT3 inhibitor was developed for adult patients dealing with relapsed or refractory acute leukemia. Biomea is dedicated to utilizing oral covalent small molecules to address conditions such as diabetes, obesity, and genetically defined cancers in order to enhance patient outcomes.

news.headline: Eyenovia, Inc. prices $1.9M registered direct offering with 20,085,025 shares at $0.0969 per share, includes warrants.
news.summary: Eyenovia, Inc. announced a securities purchase agreement with a healthcare-focused institutional investor to sell 20,085,025 shares of common stock and warrants for the purchase of up to 40,170,050 shares in a registered direct offering. The offering price was $0.0969 per share with warrants also priced at $0.0969 per share, exercisable after six months for a five-year period. The closing is anticipated around December 9, 2024, pending standard closing conditions. This transaction shows Eyenovia's efforts in commercializing its ophthalmic technology products.

news.headline: Verrica Pharma's partner Torii Pharma files NDA in Japan for TO-208 (VP-102) for Molluscum Contagiosum.
news.summary: West Chester-headquartered Verrica Pharmaceuticals Inc. revealed that its development and commercialization partner, Torii Pharmaceutical Co. Ltd., has filed a New Drug Application (NDA) for TO-208 (also known as VP-102 and YCANTH® in the U.S.) to treat Molluscum Contagiosum in Japan. This application marks a significant step in providing medical interventions for skin diseases. Verrica, a dermatology therapeutics company listed on Nasdaq as VRCA, focuses on developing treatments for such conditions.

news.headline: Pacira BioSciences grants inducement awards to 4 new employees under Nasdaq Rule 5635(C)(4) on Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Pacira BioSciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: PCRX) based in Parsippany, N.J., a leading provider of innovative non-opioid pain treatments, disclosed the issuance of inducement awards to four newly hired employees. These awards were granted under Pacira’s Amended and Restated 2014 Inducement Plan as a significant incentive for the employees to join the company. The Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors approved these awards in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: Playtika Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: PLTK) will participate in investor conferences in Q4 2024 with CFO Craig Abrahams.
news.summary: In Herzliya, Israel on December 6, 2024, Playtika Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: PLTK) revealed that Craig Abrahams, the company's President and CFO, will partake in investor conferences during the fourth quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Taysha Gene Therapies granted new employee option for 152,000 shares of common stock under Nasdaq rule on Dec 2, 2024.
news.summary: In Dallas on December 6, 2024, Taysha Gene Therapies, Inc. (Nasdaq: TSHA) revealed that on December 2, 2024, the Compensation Committee of Taysha's Board of Directors approved an option for a new employee to buy 152,000 shares of the Company's common stock as part of their employment terms. This stock option was granted under the Taysha Gene Therapies, Inc. 2023 Inducement Plan in line with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Taysha is a clinical-stage biotechnology company concentrating on advancing adeno-associated virus (AAV)-based gene therapies for severe monogenic diseases of the central nervous system (CNS).

news.headline: Lifetime Brands (Nasdaq: LCUT) to join Keybanc Capital Markets' virtual event on Dec 12-13, 2024. #ConsumerSpotlight
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, Lifetime Brands, Inc. (NasdaqGS: LCUT), a prominent company specializing in consumer products for home use, disclosed its involvement in the Keybanc Capital Markets December Consumer Spotlight event scheduled for December 12-13, 2024. The event will take place online and is significant for the company's management team.

news.headline: Synergy CHC Corp reported 7th consecutive profitable quarter and Q3 2024 financial results.
news.summary: In Westbrook, Maine, on December 6, 2024, Synergy CHC Corp. (NASDAQ: SNYR), a company offering consumer health care and lifestyle products, revealed its financial performance for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: Celularity's net product sales surged over sevenfold from Q3 2023 to Q3 2024, reaching impressive growth milestones.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, Celularity Inc. (Nasdaq: CELU), headquartered in Florham Park, New Jersey, a leading company in regenerative and cellular medicine, shared that it has submitted its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the quarter ending September 30, 2024. This milestone means that the Company is up-to-date on its quarterly report submissions, showcasing its commitment to transparency and compliance with financial regulations.

news.headline: PDS Biotech grants inducement stock options to employee under Nasdaq rule, offering 7,000 shares as incentive.
news.summary: PDS Biotechnology Corporation based in Princeton, NJ, revealed that on December 3, 2024, it issued nonstatutory stock options for 7,000 shares of common stock to an employee in the clinical department. This move was made as a significant inducement for the employee's recruitment, aligning with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) and PDS Biotech’s 2019 Inducement Plan, amended on June 17, 2019, to grant equity awards to new hires. PDS Biotech, listed as PDSB on Nasdaq, specializes in late-stage immunotherapy for enhancing the immune system's ability to fight cancer and develop vaccines for infectious diseases.

news.headline: Lit Thinking partners with Harmony Learning Center, installing Visium devices for child health and safety.
news.summary: Harmony, Minn. - Lit Thinking recently installed advanced Visium devices at Harmony Kids Learning Center in a strategic move to boost the safety, health, and educational opportunities for children. This initiative serves as a testament to Harmony Kids Learning Center’s dedication to improving the well-being of children and aligns with Lit Thinking's mission to assist businesses in establishing secure, healthy, and efficient indoor environments. Evrsphere, a prominent sustainability consulting firm, played a key role in this project.

Secured Overnight Financing Rate 4.59% December 5 vs 4.59% December 4.
Enterprise Products Partners L.P. (NYSE: EPD) to attend investor conferences in NYC on Dec 9 and 10-11, 2024. Investor deck available online.
news.summary: Enterprise Products Partners L.P. (NYSE: EPD) revealed plans to engage in investor meetings at upcoming conferences in New York City. The company will take part in the Mizuho Power, Energy & Infrastructure Conference on December 9, 2024, followed by the Wells Fargo 23rd Annual Midstream, Energy & Utilities Symposium on December 10-11, 2024. The investor deck for these meetings is available under the Investors section on Enterprise's website, offering insights into the company's performance and future strategies.

news.headline: Sun Valley Investments AG successfully acquires shares of Mineros S.A. at CAD $0.975 per Common Share.
news.summary: Sun Valley Investments AG has officially concluded the acceptance period for its public offer to acquire common shares of Mineros S.A. The offer was made through the Colombia Securities Exchange at a price of CAD $0.975 per Common Share in cash. Mineros, listed as TSX: MSA, CB: MINEROS, saw a successful response to the Oferta Pública de Adquisición (OPA) from Sun Valley.

news.headline: EU Mercosur deal to save EU businesses €4 bln duties per year.
Mercosur deal protects 350 EU products geographical indication.
Market forecast for AI data center networks and power requirements offered by ResearchAndMarkets, includes 10-year assessment and predictions.
news.summary: Dublin-based ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included the "Networks and Power Requirements for AI Data Centers: A Ten-year Market Forecast and Technology Assessment" report in its offerings. The report delves into the market for networks and related connectivity products for AI data centers and AI clusters, providing an assessment and ten-year forecast. It presents detailed projections on the volume and value of essential products and markets within the AI data center and cluster sector.

news.headline: Industry report on South Africa's soap, cleaning products, wax, and polishes sector till 2024 with 45 key players.
news.summary: A recent report on the manufacture of soap, cleaning products, wax, and polishes industry in South Africa has been made available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report covers personal and homecare products along with industrial items, highlighting key trends, major players in the market, trade insights, and influencing factors like economic circumstances, technological advancements, research and development activities, and competitive landscape. It provides a comprehensive overview of the industry in South Africa, offering valuable insights into the market.

news.headline: Destination 2D revolutionizes energy-efficient chips with wafer-scale synthesis of high-quality graphene in CMOS process.
news.summary: A new semiconductor startup named Destination 2D™, based in Milpitas, California, revealed on December 6, 2024, that they have accomplished the wafer-scale production of high-quality graphene. This achievement was made possible through their advanced expertise in graphene process technology. The synthesis took place under CMOS-compatible process conditions, marking a significant breakthrough in semiconductor manufacturing.
